step_rationale: Regulates endothelial apoptosis and inflammatory signaling; links to endothelial activation.
mechanism: CPEB1 controls endothelial cell apoptosis and inflammatory pathways contributing to endothelial erosion.

references.title: Depletion of CPEB1 protects against oxidized LDL-induced endothelial apoptosis and inflammation though SIRT1/LOX-1 signalling pathway.
